identified_pain_points: struggling to consistently fill their pipeline with qualified leads
spending too much time on manual outreach instead of delivering client work
losing deals to larger firms that appear more established online

variations.subject: NexGen's lead pipeline — quick thought
variations.body:
Hey [First Name],

Running an AI consulting firm is ironic in one way — you're selling automation to clients, but your own lead gen is probably still manual.

I've talked to a dozen AI consultants in the past month. Almost all of them are getting 80% of new business from referrals and feeling stuck when that dries up.

At LeadFlow AI, we built a system that automatically identifies, qualifies, and delivers warm leads for consulting firms like NexGen — so you're pitching, not prospecting.

Would a quick 20-minute demo make sense? No pitch, just show you the setup.

— Sarah

P.S. We set one client up last month — they booked 3 discovery calls in the first week.
variations.ps: P.S. We set one client up last month — they booked 3 discovery calls in the first week.

variations.subject: 40 leads/month for an AI consultancy
variations.body:
Hey [First Name],

A few months ago, a small AI consulting firm (2 partners, no SDR) was getting maybe 4–5 inbound inquiries a month.

We plugged in our lead automation system. Within 6 weeks they were seeing 40+ qualified leads per month — companies actively looking for AI consulting help.

No cold calls. No LinkedIn spam. Just automated, targeted outreach that actually sounds human.

I think NexGen could see similar results. Mind if I show you how it works — 20 minutes, free?

— Sarah

P.S. Happy to share the exact breakdown of what we built for them.
variations.ps: P.S. Happy to share the exact breakdown of what we built for them.

variations.subject: Where do NexGen's best clients come from?
variations.body:
Hey [First Name],

Quick question — if you had to guess, what's the #1 source of your best clients right now?

For most AI consultancies I talk to, the honest answer is "someone I already knew" or "a random referral."

That's great until it isn't.

We built LeadFlow AI specifically so firms like NexGen don't have to rely on luck. It automates the prospecting layer — finding and warming up companies that are already looking for AI help.

Curious if it'd be worth a 20-minute look?

— Sarah

P.S. No deck, no pitch — just the live system.
variations.ps: P.S. No deck, no pitch — just the live system.

follow_up.subject: Re: quick thought for NexGen
follow_up.body:
Hey [First Name],

Sent you a note a few days ago — not sure if it got buried.

One thing I forgot to mention: we only work with 3–4 new clients per month to keep quality high. Two spots are open right now.

Still happy to show you the demo if the timing's right — totally understand if it's not.

— Sarah

P.S. Takes 20 minutes. You'd know by the end if it's a fit.
follow_up.ps: P.S. Takes 20 minutes. You'd know by the end if it's a fit.
